svg.style: font-family: "Mona Sans", Inter, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, sans-serif;
svg.title: GoPerfect production pipeline architecture, Qdrant brand-aligned
svg.desc: Six-layer architecture diagram showing the GoPerfect recruiting pipeline. Recruiter intent flows into an agent orchestration engine with four components and an LLM reasoning layer. Parallel sub-queries fan out to a hybrid retrieval layer over Qdrant, which queries a structured candidate index of 100M+ profiles with multi-vector representation. A proprietary verification layer produces a ranked shortlist.

g.text: Natural language prompt decomposition, constraint extraction, intent classification
LLM reasoning layer: evaluation, scoring, ranking assembly
100M+ enriched candidate profiles, multi-vector per point
Cross-reference signals, confidence scoring, fraud detection
